name: Ketch
description: Ketch — Privacy data governance platform with consent management, data mapping, and regulatory compliance tools.

seo.title: Ketch — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Ketch: Ketch — Privacy data governance platform with consent management, data mapping, and regulatory compliance tools.

when_to_use: Privacy consent management and data governance platform
Automated compliance for GDPR, CCPA, and global privacy laws
Data mapping and classification across SaaS and databases
DSR (data subject request) automation across connected systems
Privacy engineering workflow for data-driven product teams

cons: Feature overlap with OneTrust and Transcend
review.verdict: Full-stack privacy governance for mid-to-large enterprises, OneTrust and Transcend remain the category gorillas.
review.best_for: Mid-market companies consolidating consent and data mapping under one platform
review.not_for: Engineering-led teams who prefer OSS or dev-first privacy tooling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
